product_overview: GradeFlow is a student-focused academic analytics app that lets users compute accurate SGPA/CGPA, track multi-semester trends, plan future semesters, scan backlog impact, and view saved analytics dashboards.
core_goals: Compute accurate semester and cumulative GPAs from subject-level inputs
Save and review historical calculations and performance trends
Create semester plans that translate a target CGPA into required per-semester or per-course targets
Assess backlog items and understand their impact and remediation priority
Predict required grades to achieve a specified target CGPA

features.name: Landing / Home
features.description: Introduce the product, surface core features and visual-first brand animations so users can learn what GradeFlow offers and navigate to tools.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See hero feature overview and primary value propositions -> Scroll to stats section -> Observe animated counters and feature cards -> Select a tool card to continue
Navigate to / -> Observe hero entrance animation and staggered text -> Explore feature highlights and available tools

features.name: GPA Calculation
features.description: Enter subjects with credits and marks or grade points to calculate SGPA/CGPA and optionally save results to the dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /calculator -> Add new subjects to the list -> Enter subject names, credits, and scores -> Toggle between percentage and grade points -> Submit calculation -> See SGPA and CGPA results
Navigate to /calculator -> Add new subjects to the list -> Enter subject names, credits, and scores -> Submit calculation -> Save results to dashboard -> See confirmation that results were saved
Navigate to /calculator -> Add new subjects to the list -> Leave one subject grade empty -> Submit calculation -> See inline validation errors for missing grade fields

features.name: Academic Analytics (Dashboard)
features.description: View saved calculations rendered as charts and trend lines to analyze past performance and semester history.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Load saved calculation history -> View charts and trend summaries -> Hover over charts to see detailed data -> Navigate through semester history to inspect earlier records
Navigate to /dashboard -> Filter or browse saved calculations -> Select a past calculation to view detailed breakdown and visual trend

features.name: Semester Planner
features.description: Create semester-level plans by specifying goals so users can see required SGPA and suggested course load for upcoming terms.
user_flows: Navigate to /planner -> Set target CGPA and number of remaining semesters -> Provide current CGPA and completed credits -> Generate per-semester SGPA targets to meet the goal -> Review recommended course load or adjustments
Navigate to /planner -> Set a target CGPA that is lower than current CGPA -> Generate plan -> See calculated advice for maintaining or improving trajectory

features.name: Multi-Semester Tracking
features.description: Record and visualize multiple semesters to track performance trends and identify improvement or decline over time.
user_flows: Navigate to /multi-semester -> Add a new semester record with credits and SGPA -> Save the semester record -> See the trend chart update to include the new semester
Navigate to /multi-semester -> Browse existing semester records -> View trend visualization and summary statistics across semesters

features.name: Backlog Impact Scanner
features.description: Model the academic impact of backlog or failed courses and receive prioritized remediation suggestions and risk assessment.
user_flows: Navigate to /backlog -> Add backlog items or past failed course entries -> Run backlog impact scan -> Review prioritized risk assessment and suggested remediation actions
Navigate to /backlog -> Provide completed course retake plans and updated credits -> Run scan -> See updated impact and revised CGPA projection

features.name: Grade Predictor
features.description: Estimate the required grades per subject to hit a target CGPA based on current records and upcoming course credits.
user_flows: Navigate to /predictor -> Enter current CGPA, upcoming semester credits, and target CGPA -> Generate per-course grade predictions required to meet the target -> Review the required grades and adjustments
Navigate to /predictor -> Adjust the target CGPA downward -> Regenerate predictions -> Compare scenarios to decide achievable targets

routes.description: GradeFlow landing page with features overview
Backlog impact scanner and risk assessment
Multi-semester GPA tracking and trend analysis
Semester academic planner and course scheduler
Grade predictor based on target CGPA

features.name: GPA Calculation
features.description: Calculate SGPA/CGPA based on marks or grade points
user_interactions: Add new subjects to the list
Enter subject names, credits, and scores
Toggle between percentage and grade points
Click "Save to Dashboard" to persist results

features.name: Academic Analytics
features.description: View academic performance trends and charts
user_interactions: Hover over charts to see detailed data
